tagline: We Want To Make Your Pool Sparkling Clean!

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Sunshine-Level
Care
hero.subheadline: Florida pools demand expert attention year-round. Tropical Sunshine Pools delivers CPO-certified, owner-operated service so you can stop worrying about chemicals and equipment and start enjoying every swim.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care So You<br class="hidden md:block"> Can Just Swim
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, Tropical Sunshine Pools handles it all. Sit back, relax, and let a CPO-certified professional keep your water perfect.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, filter checks, and equipment inspections every week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and plumbing — diagnosed and repaired fast by a CPO-certified technician. Most issues fixed same-visit.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae takeover? We bring your pool back to crystal clear in 48-72 hours. Emergency same-day response available for urgent situations.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no irritation — just perfect water every time.

cards.title: Pressure Washing
cards.description: Professional pressure washing for pool decks, patios, driveways, and surrounding areas. Remove algae, mold, and buildup to restore surfaces to like-new condition.

cards.title: Filter & Pump Service
cards.description: Deep cleaning, inspection, and maintenance of your filtration system and pump. Extend equipment life and keep water flowing efficiently all year.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll come out for a free inspection. You'll get an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Zach and the Tropical Sunshine team arrive on schedule, every time. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — all handled by a CPO-certified professional.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, swim-ready, and worry-free all year. If you're ever not satisfied, we come back and make it right — that's our guarantee.

about.label: Why Jacksonville Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated — Your Pool Gets Zach's Personal Attention
about.description: Founded by Zach Fonda, a Jacksonville native with a passion for great service, Tropical Sunshine Pools has kept St. Johns County pools sparkling since 2019. As an owner-operated company, every pool gets hands-on, CPO-certified care — not a random technician who doesn't know your system. Licensed, insured, and committed to 100% satisfaction, we treat your pool like it's our own.

features.title: Owner-Operated Service
features.description: Zach personally oversees every pool. No subcontractors, no revolving door of strangers — just consistent, reliable care from someone who knows your pool.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.

features.title: 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. Your satisfaction isn't negotiable — it's the standard we hold ourselves to.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Sparkling Clean" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. No arguments, no fine print. We don't rest until your pool meets the Tropical Sunshine standard. That's the promise Zach makes to every single customer.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Jacksonville and St. Johns County area are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just give us a call and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you service my pool?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most of our clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you're out. You'll receive a service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Is Tropical Sunshine Pools licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are a licensed pool service provider, CPO (Certified Pool Operator) certified, and fully insured. Your property and peace of mind are always protected when we're on the job.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel my service?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. We don't do contracts, cancellation penalties, or guilt trips. We believe in earning your business every single visit — and most of our clients have been with us for years.

faqs.question: What areas do you service in Jacksonville?
faqs.answer: We serve Mandarin, Julington Creek, Durbin, Saint Johns, and surrounding communities in Jacksonville and northern St. Johns County. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, give us a call — we're happy to check.

testimonials.name: Verified Homeowner
testimonials.text: Very committed, always on time, and very thorough. They always answer questions and concerns. They just do a great job with our pool. Highly recommend Tropical Sunshine Pools.

testimonials.name: St. Johns Resident
testimonials.text: Efficient, reliable, and courteous service every single time. Our pool has never looked better since switching to Tropical Sunshine Pools. Zach truly cares about doing things right.

testimonials.name: Jacksonville Homeowner
testimonials.text: My home looks great after their pressure washing service. Dependable, quality work every time. I wouldn't trust anyone else with my pool or property.

benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
